title: 🔥存量博弈，BTC主导格局未变
body: 市场处于典型的存量博弈阶段，资金结构向比特币倾斜。BTC.D 数据录得 59.2%，7 日变化为 +0.5%。尽管近期价格波动，但持续处于 59% 上方的指标意味着资金并未流向山寨币，市场流动性依旧紧缩并集中于头部资产。这种结构下，山寨币难以启动独立行情。资金外溢信号何时出现？
title_en: 🔥 Zero-sum game, BTC dominance remains unchanged
body_en: The market is in a typical zero-sum game phase, with capital structure tilting towards Bitcoin. BTC.D sits at 59.2%, with a 7-day change of +0.5%. Despite recent volatility, the indicator holding above 59% means capital is not flowing into altcoins; market liquidity remains tight and concentrated in top-tier assets. Under this structure, altcoins struggle to launch independent rallies. When will the capital spillover signal appear?
